name: Feature development

predicate: every acceptance criterion in the spec is demonstrably met
the full test suite passes with no regressions
no unaddressed high or critical security finding remains (each is fixed or carries an approved risk-acceptance decision)
performance-sensitive surfaces meet their stated budget with no regression beyond threshold

G-tests.description: Test suite passes with no regressions.

G-assets-present.passCriteria: every asset named in the experience contract resolves

G-imports-used.description: Named primitives/modules are implemented or imported where expected.
G-imports-used.passCriteria: no named dependency is missing or substituted

G-acceptance.description: Every acceptance criterion in the spec is demonstrably met.

G-security.description: Security review found no unaddressed high or critical vulnerability (OWASP Top 10, authn/authz, secrets, dependency/supply-chain).
G-security.passCriteria: a security review is recorded and every high/critical finding is fixed or carries an approved risk-acceptance decision

G-performance.description: Performance review found no regression beyond the change's stated budget (latency, throughput, resource use).
G-performance.passCriteria: performance-sensitive surfaces meet their stated budget with evidence; none regress beyond threshold

G-visual.description: Visual output matches the approved reference.

stopConditions: the problem, target user, or desired outcome is unclear after discovery
specification is attempted before research findings are recorded (research must precede spec)
spec scope or target user is ambiguous
the plan would commit to an architecture the project has not used
a gate's required decision is still pending (pending is not approved)
release is attempted with an unaddressed high or critical security finding and no approved risk-acceptance decision
release is attempted before the verify report shows acceptance criteria are met
